about.title: About Immobilier
about.subtitle: Switzerland's trusted real estate platform
about.missionText: We connect property seekers with the best listings and agencies across Switzerland. Our platform makes finding your next home simple, transparent, and efficient.
about.body:
Immobilier.ch is Switzerland's leading property search platform. We connect buyers, renters, and agencies to make real estate simple and transparent.

Our Mission

We connect property seekers with the best listings and agencies across Switzerland. Our platform makes finding your next home simple, transparent, and efficient.

Our Values

  • Transparency in every listing
  • Trusted agencies and verified properties
  • Multilingual support for all of Switzerland

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using Immobilier, you agree to these terms of service.
terms.body:
These Terms of Use govern your use of the Immobilier platform. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

Use of Service

You may use the platform to search, view, and inquire about property listings. You agree not to misuse the service or access it using automated means without our permission.

Intellectual Property

All content on this platform is the property of Immobilier.ch or its licensors. You may not reproduce or distribute any content without permission.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
privacy.body:
At Immobilier.ch, your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide when creating an account, submitting inquiries, or using our services, including name, email, and usage data.

How We Use Your Data

We use your data to provide our services, improve the platform, and send relevant notifications. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
